description: Interactive SVG canvas for designing state-machine workflows. Renders states as shaped nodes (pill for initial, double-border for final, rounded rect for intermediate) connected by curved transition arrows. Supports drag-to-move nodes, drag-from-port to create transitions, zoom/pan via JS interop, context menus, grid snapping, and read-only mode.

examples.title: Editable workflow designer
examples.code: <TmWorkflowDesignerCanvas Definition="@_workflow" DefinitionChanged="@(def => _workflow = def)" OnStateSelected="@(s => _selectedState = s)" OnTransitionSelected="@(t => _selectedTransition = t)" SelectedStateId="@_selectedState?.Id" SelectedTransitionId="@_selectedTransition?.Id" />
